checks.criterion: [UI-observable] The page shows Unclear Requirements selected and displays the current recommended command before any click.
checks.dom_assert: page served successfully; source contains Unclear Requirements and maestro-brainstorm

checks.criterion: [UI-observable] Choosing a next command changes the displayed recommended command and highlights a different active SVG node or edge.
checks.dom_assert: source contains activeStepId, choice onClick handlers, edge-active and node-active classes

checks.criterion: [UI-observable] At a closing node, the detail panel shows Stop, Quality Pipeline, and Knowledge Capture route labels without rendering downstream pipeline steps.
checks.dom_assert: source contains Stop, Quality Pipeline, Knowledge Capture and continuation-route styles

checks.criterion: [UI-observable] Checklist checkboxes can be toggled by pointer and keyboard, and the completed count changes on screen.
checks.dom_assert: source contains checkbox inputs, checkedItems state, and completedChecks count
